name: Yelena Mikhailova || Frostbite
description:
[Marvel OC]: Ice-Breaker

In which Frostbite goes to a bar. (And gives free drinks to all mutants— ain’t she a sweetheart?)

TW just in case: mention of freezing and breaking a limb.

Notes

  • totally open-ended user-role (are you a bar-goer? A hero who gets involved? An ally looking for her? It’s all up to you!)

  • I didn’t add this to my X-Men lorebooks because I still haven’t decided whether Yelena will be connected or a standalone character....
creator: Pinkloftwing
